TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Mahmoud_Abdul-Rauf, title = Mahmoud_Abdul-Rauf, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Mahmoud_Abdul-Rauf} }

S.FORM: Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 3, Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf, squliq na p'unro. Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players

Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas tay 1969, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 3, Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf, squliq na p'unro. Mahmoud Abdul-Rauf hya'ga NBA pgnaw' mari' misuw qaniy, qutux sa p'aras mari' tpucing tay suruw. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: maħmou* aβ*ul-rau* s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, maħmou* aβ*ul-rau*, s~ɕquliq na pʔunro. maħmou* aβ*ul-rau* ħjaʔɣa nβa pɣnawʔ mariʔ mis~ɕuw qanij, qutux s~ɕa pʔaras~ɕ mariʔ tpuʦ~ʨiŋ taj s~ɕuruw. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
